notes.title: Minecraft Map Artist Sourcing Guide - 12 Additional Channels Beyond Fiverr
notes.content:
## Minecraft Map Artist Sourcing Guide - 12 Additional Channels

### Overview
Current outreach (Fiverr - Benad E, BuiltByBit, Discord) has platform friction. This guide provides alternative channels with direct contact methods to accelerate Ice Dragon video production.

---

## CATEGORY 1: Freelance Platforms (Direct Contact)

### 1. Upwork (upwork.com)
**Contact Method**: Platform messaging (no CAPTCHA, email notifications)
**Search Terms**: "Minecraft builder", "Minecraft world", "Minecraft cinematic"
**Advantages**:
- Professional freelancers with portfolios
- Escrow payment protection
- Time tracking for hourly projects
- Direct email once project starts

**Recommended Approach**:
1. Post a job: "Minecraft Map Builder for YouTube Cinematic - $150 Fixed"
2. Review proposals (typically 5-15 within 24h)
3. Interview top 3 via Upwork messenger
4. Hire with milestone payment (50% start, 50% delivery)

**Expected Response Rate**: 80%+ (platform incentivizes quick responses)

---

### 2. PeoplePerHour (peopleperhour.com)
**Contact Method**: Direct messaging + email notifications
**Search Terms**: "Minecraft", "game design", "3D environment"
**Advantages**:
- UK/EU focused ( timezone overlap with EST afternoons)
- Hourlies feature for fixed-price offerings
- Lower competition than Fiverr/Upwork

**Recommended Approach**:
1. Browse "Hourlies" for existing Minecraft services
2. Contact 3-5 sellers directly
3. Request custom quote for 100x100 block build

---

### 3. Guru (guru.com)
**Contact Method**: WorkRoom messaging + direct email
**Advantages**:
- Lower fees than other platforms
- Good for ongoing relationships
- Detailed portfolio showcases

---

## CATEGORY 2: Minecraft-Specific Marketplaces

### 4. MC-Market (mc-market.org)
**Contact Method**: Forum PM + Discord links in profiles
**Requirements**: Free account (email verification only)
**Section**: "Services" → "Building Services"
**Advantages**:
- Minecraft-native community
- Builders understand cinematic needs
- Direct portfolio links in signatures

**Recommended Approach**:
1. Create account with YouTube channel in bio (builds credibility)
2. Post in "Looking for Builders" subforum
3. Include: budget ($150), timeline (5 days), project type (YouTube cinematic)
4. Review seller profiles with "Trusted" or "Verified" badges

**Top Builders to Contact** (as of Feb 2026):
- Search for users with "Builder" or "Architect" titles
- Look for recent activity (within 30 days)
- Check feedback scores (>10 positive reviews)

---

### 5. Minecraft Schematics (minecraft-schematics.com)
**Contact Method**: Profile contact forms + website links
**Advantages**:
- Builders showcase actual builds
- Download history shows popularity
- Many include business email in profile

**Recommended Approach**:
1. Search "jungle temple", "dinosaur", "cinematic"
2. Identify top builders by download count
3. Visit profiles for contact info
4. Email directly: "Saw your [build name] on MCS - interested in custom commission"

---

### 6. Planet Minecraft (planetminecraft.com)
**Contact Method**: Site PM + external links in profiles
**Advantages**:
- Largest Minecraft creative community
- Portfolio-based discovery
- Many builders list commission rates

**Recommended Approach**:
1. Search "jungle ruins", "prehistoric", "temple"
2. Filter by "Projects" with high diamonds/views
3. Check builder profiles for "Commissions: Open"
4. Use PMC PM system or external contact

**Direct Contact Method**:
- Many builders link Twitter/X or Discord in profile
- Some list business emails directly
- PM system notifies via email

---

## CATEGORY 3: Reddit Communities (No CAPTCHA)

### 7. r/MinecraftBuilds
**Contact Method**: Reddit DM (no CAPTCHA, email optional)
**Subscriber Count**: 500K+
**Advantages**:
- Large active community
- Builders post portfolio showcases
- Direct user-to-user messaging

**Recommended Approach**:
1. Create post: "[Commission] Looking for Minecraft Builder - $150 Budget - YouTube Project"
2. Include: style reference, budget, timeline, usage
3. Review portfolios in comments
4. DM promising builders

**Post Template**:
```
[Commission] Prehistoric Jungle Map Build - $150

Hi builders! I'm a YouTuber looking for a custom Minecraft map:

**Style**: Prehistoric jungle with temple ruins
**Size**: 100x100 blocks minimum
**Budget**: $150 USD
**Timeline**: 5 days
**Usage**: YouTube video (169K subs, credit given)

Looking for someone with cinematic build experience. DM me your portfolio if interested!
```

---

### 8. r/MinecraftBuddies
**Contact Method**: Reddit DM
**Focus**: Collaboration and commissions
**Advantages**:
- Specifically for finding partners
- Lower competition for attention
- More serious builders

---

### 9. r/MinecraftServer
**Contact Method**: Reddit DM
**Focus**: Server builds (good for large-scale)
**Advantages**:
- Builders experienced with spawn areas
- Often have portfolio websites

---

## CATEGORY 4: Social Media Direct Contact

### 10. Twitter/X Search
**Contact Method**: DM or reply (public contact info common)
**Search Queries**:
- "Minecraft builder commissions open"
- "Minecraft build for hire"
- "Minecraft architect available"
**Filter**: Latest (past week)

**Recommended Approach**:
1. Search queries above
2. Review media tab for portfolio
3. Check pinned tweet for commission status
4. DM: "Hi! Saw your builds on Twitter. Are you taking commissions?"

**Note**: Many builders list Carrd/Linktree with email in bio

---

### 11. Instagram (minecraft builds hashtag)
**Contact Method**: DM or email in bio
**Hashtags**: #minecraftbuilds #minecraftbuilder #minecraftcommission
**Advantages**:
- Visual-first portfolio
- Stories show work-in-progress
- Professional builders maintain presence

**Recommended Approach**:
1. Search hashtags above
2. Review top posts from past month
3. Check bio for "Commissions open" or "Business: email@..."
4. DM with project details

---

### 12. DeviantArt
**Contact Method**: Site notes + external links
**Search**: "Minecraft", "voxel art", "game environment"
**Advantages**:
- Long-established art community
- Detailed portfolio showcases
- Commission widgets available

---

## CATEGORY 5: Direct Outreach (Highest Success Rate)

### YouTube Comments Strategy
**Target**: Small Minecraft build channels (1K-50K subs)
**Contact Method**: Comment + about page email
**Approach**:
1. Find channels with "Minecraft timelapse", "Minecraft build" content
2. Comment on recent video: "Incredible work! Do you take commissions?"
3. Check About page for business email
4. Send professional inquiry

**Why This Works**:
- Builders already making content = active
- Smaller channels more likely to accept
- YouTube connection = credibility

---

## PRIORITY ACTION SEQUENCE

### Immediate (Next 2 Hours)
1. **Upwork**: Post job listing ($150, fixed price)
2. **r/MinecraftBuilds**: Create commission post
3. **MC-Market**: Create account, post in Services

### Short-term (24 Hours)
4. **Twitter/X**: DM 5 builders found via search
5. **Planet Minecraft**: PM 3 builders with open commissions
6. **YouTube**: Comment on 5 build timelapse channels

### Follow-up (48 Hours)
7. Review all responses
8. Select best candidate based on:
   - Portfolio quality (cinematic builds)
   - Response professionalism
   - Timeline feasibility
   - Price within budget

---

## CONTACT TEMPLATE (Universal)

**Subject/Opening**: Custom Minecraft Map Commission - $150

**Body**:
Hi [Name],

I came across your portfolio and was impressed by your Minecraft builds. I'm a YouTuber with 169K subscribers looking to commission a custom map for an upcoming video.

**Project Details**:
- Theme: Prehistoric jungle with ancient temple ruins
- Key Features: Temple structure, T-Rex enclosure (100x100), small village
- Style: Cinematic/atmospheric for video production
- Deliverable: World file with marked camera positions
- Timeline: 5 days
- Budget: $150 USD

The map will be featured in an "I Got a Pet Ice Dragon" video with full credit to you.

Are you currently available for commissions? I'd love to discuss further!

Best,
Steven
[YouTube channel link]

---

## SUCCESS METRICS

| Channel | Target Contacts | Expected Response | Timeline |
|---------|-----------------|-------------------|----------|
| Upwork | 1 job post | 5-15 proposals | 24h |
| Reddit | 1 post + 3 DMs | 3-5 responses | 24-48h |
| Twitter/X | 5 DMs | 2-3 responses | 24-72h |
| MC-Market | 1 post | 2-4 responses | 48h |
| PMC | 3 PMs | 1-2 responses | 48-72h |
| YouTube | 5 comments | 1-2 responses | 72h+ |

**Total Expected Qualified Leads**: 15-31 responses
**Conversion to Hire**: 1 confirmed artist

---

## NEXT STEPS (AUTOMATED TRACKING)

Update STATE.json activeTasks when:
- [ ] Upwork job posted
- [ ] Reddit post created
- [ ] 3+ builders contacted via DM
- [ ] First response received
- [ ] Portfolio reviewed
- [ ] Artist selected
- [ ] Commission confirmed

---

*Research Note Created: 2026-02-10 | Priority: HIGH | Status: Ready for Execution | Linked Task: active-001*
